titleStmt.title: SII 15.189: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 188. (B.K. No. 25 of 1926-27.) NĀGĀVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Kōḍi Basavaṇṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1177, Rākshasa Vaiśākha, śu. 15, Thursday, Saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1255 A.D. April 1922, Thursday, f.d.t. °31. The Saṅkrānti which was Vṛishabha occurred four days later.

It records a gift of land for offerings to the god Mahābaḷēśvara by [Lā]ḷa-Ghausaṭa nāyaka, after washing the feet of āchārya Kēdāradēva. The donor is said to have purchased the land from a resident of Kālaḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhu
jabaḷa pratāpacakrava¨rtti śrī vīrakaṁnaradēvavi
jarājyōdayadalu śaka 1177 neya rā
kṣasa saṁvatsarada vaiśākha suddha 15 brihaspa
tivāra byatīpāta saṁkrāntiyalu
śrī mahābaḷēśvaradēva¨rggegōsage Upāra hālumaṁ
ḍagegeṁdu śrīmatu lāḷaghausaṭanāyakaru
kālaḍiya maṁneya basavaṁdaviyara kaiyyalu taṁma
śrīmānyada nāgāviya maṁneyageyya voḷage lakhu
maṇēśvaradēvara mānyaṁ hattire paḍuvaseya bhūta
ya krayavāgi koṁḍu śrī mahābaḷadēvara Ā
cā¨ryya kēdāradēvara pādaprakṣāḷana māḍi dhārāpū
¨rvvakavāgi koṭṭa keyya mattaru nālkumaṁ nāgāviya nālku
gauḍugaḷu Eṁṭu hiṭṭu Aṟuvattokkalu sa¨rvvā
bādheparihāravāgi Ācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ pratipāḷi
suvaru . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
sva(ra)dataṁ vā parādattaṁ vā yō hvarēti vaśuṁdha
rā saṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 15.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
